title: scabiosa atropurpurea var. mauritii
intro: Scabiosa atropurpurea var. mauritii, also known as the purple pincushion flower, is a variety of the scabiosa atropurpurea plant that belongs to the honeysuckle family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scabiosa atropurpurea var. mauritii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
